name: Fried Spinach (Rau Muong Xao)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any fat from the steak and slice it thinly.
2. Chop the onion finely and combine with the meat, half a teaspoon of pepper, half a tablespoon of fish sauce, and cornstarch.
3. Rinse the spinach and cut each leaf into three pieces.
4. Slice the tomato into thin wedges and crush the garlic.
5. Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons of oil in a frying pan.
6. Add the remaining garlic and stir fry until fragrant.
7. Add the spinach and stir fry for three minutes.
8. Add the remaining fish sauce and tomato, then stir fry for two minutes.
9. Remove to a heated serving platter.
10. Heat the remaining oil in the frying pan.
11. Add the meat and stir fry for five minutes.
12. If the meat sticks to the pan, add two tablespoons of water.
13. Remove the meat from the pan and sprinkle over the spinach.
14. Sprinkle with pepper and serve.
